enabled.description: Whether scrobbles from this source are being mirrored into Rocksky.

externalUsername.description: Username on the external service (Last.fm / ListenBrainz). Null for Teal.fm.

hasCredentials.description: True when an API key is stored. Last.fm/ListenBrainz only; always false for Teal.fm.

lastPolledAt.description: The last time the mirror process successfully polled this source.

lastScrobbleSeenAt.description: Watermark — scrobbles from the external service older than this are skipped.
